allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "powershell -command ""Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }""")
